name: Questar Corporation
description: Questar Corporation was a prominent natural gas-focused energy company headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah. The company operated primarily in the Rocky Mountain region, specializing in natural gas distribution, pipeline transportation, and storage services. In 2016, Questar Corporation was acquired by Dominion Resources, Inc. (now known as Dominion Energy, Inc.), a major American power and energy company based in Virginia. Following the acquisition, Questar's operations were integrated into Dominion Energy's portfolio, expanding the parent company's footprint in the Western United States, particularly in Utah, Wyoming, and Idaho.
